Hey guys, welcome back. I want to just give you a quick breakdown of an example of the Simon Cowell qualifier This one was used in the copy hackers 10x freelance copyright or launch in October 2018 and it goes like this so the subject line was remember when and It starts with a battlefield opener really jumping straight into the frame of this Giving those lower level outcomes that they've already achieved or transcended or things that we're going to be positioning against so Remember when you got to flip off Jerry the middle manager as you quit your job and headed into your freelance Copywriting career sipping pumpkin spice lattes on a Tuesday a AM was all the fulfillment You'd ever need from the hashtag freelance life Snagging at three-day weekend songs HR sign off as the ultimate expression of William Walls approved freedom So these are all those lower level outcomes and really specific fun colorful detail that they that are perfect buyer will have already transcended no Maybe that's because you didn't get into the freelance game for the cheap satisfaction of spending your days Working in a damn snuggie. So here's where we really begin to flip that script and reflect back those higher standards or motivations that we're calling them towards or This sicker satisfaction of slapping keys at your local Starbucks knowing your ex-colleagues were rotting away in a cubicle Chashank Like a deep fried Mars bar those small wins satisfied you for all of 13 seconds They're not why your freelance copywriter today. You have much loftier expectations of yourself around these parts. We call them 10x expectations 10x expectations You got into this freelance copy game because you wanted to make real dollars real impact enjoying the real perks And now we're really just summarizing that call to a higher game The tone here is also super assertive. You know, we are making a very A very big assumption here that they are Willing to subscribe to this and that's what makes it a qualifying email. This isn't a bad saying maybe it's right for you It's not trying to please everybody. It's saying you've transcended this This is really what we're about and this is what you need to be about if we're going to do this together And we just continue to list out those new standards and outcomes You want to build a business not just a side gig with staying power one that grows in your in revenue month after month Commanding bigger fees from better clients as your confidence trends upwards putting a big hole into the star starving writer myth and Hell if it weren't for these mistakes So the call to action is framed as the link between the higher standards and the lower standards if it weren't for these mistakes That I'll save you from on Tuesday. This leads to a webinar invite You might actually be well on your way to achieving everything, you know deep inside You could be getting from the freelance slide instead of using your creative juices to pin an apology letter to old Jerry because you're one supportive Bios is now passively aggressively suggesting. It's time to beg Jerry to let you go back to that cupicold shashank so this is really contrasting the lower standards, you know going back to Jerry and And the higher standards that we're calling them to that the product will deliver Here's the deal and then we invite them to the webinar And here's the really big qualifying statement, you know This is where we're getting them to commit to that higher standard as that mid-cro commitment or one that is a precursor to the final conversion This one's for my 10 expectations freelance copywriters not the run of the mill look at me My I landed a sweet $10 gig on Upwork freelance copywriter, but my I've chalked up some wins I got more to give so how do I literally 10x my business in 2018? freelance copywriter if that's you let's talk for an hour pumpkin spice latte optional big-time ambition not So this is really that big call to commitment PS nothing against the $10 gig Time at $10 gig freelancer just I just have high expectations of life and an insatiable hunger Which means I can better teach copywriters who have expectations and insatiable hunger if that's you you're still and but you're still accepting cheap Upwork gigs you should def come Tuesday afternoon because yeah, it's time to stop taking those cheap upward gigs Secure spot here cool. So yeah, that's just that final appeal like we are calling you to that higher standard if you are with us then Yeah, then save a seat. So this is it it is an awesome email when you really want to be in the position to Give your reader give your prospect a breakthrough in what they are willing to call themselves towards and whatever industry You're in and one that I recommend you send it's very flexible It could be an invite to a webinar which is a conversion in of itself or the final conversion which is selling your product So that's all I got for you Give this one a shot and I'll meet you in the next video
